evals.prompt: Write a draft decision record in docs/decisions for adopting a guided repository bootstrap workflow for new projects. Use parent prd-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot.
evals.expected_output: An initial response that frames the decision, presents A/B/C options with trade-offs, recommends one option for this repo, and asks the user to choose before any decision file is drafted.
expectations: The first response does not draft a decision file before the user chooses a direction.
If the repo has no existing decision records, the response treats that as a normal starting state and continues instead of blocking on missing decision history.
The response presents exactly three labeled options: A, B, and C.
Option A is explicitly recommended and explains why it fits this repo better than the others.
The response asks the user to choose A, B, or C, or refine the options before drafting.
The response treats the supplied PRD as valid parent context for the new decision.

evals.prompt: Create an active decision record in docs/decisions for using decision records to capture major technical decisions in this repo. If there is no valid parent doc yet, tell me what is missing before drafting.
evals.expected_output: An initial response that refuses to draft without a concrete upstream parent and asks for or helps identify the missing parent before proceeding.
expectations: The first response does not draft a decision file.
The response states that a main decision requires a concrete idea, PRD, or spec parent.
The response asks the user to provide or identify the parent before it can present options and draft the decision.
The response does not accept <id> or another unsupported document type as the main decision parent.

evals.prompt: Add a patch decision record in docs/decisions to decision-00020-checkout-risk-review that clarifies when suspicious guest checkout orders require manual review.
evals.expected_output: A new patch decision saved under docs/decisions with parent decision-00020-checkout-risk-review and the standard decision structure.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/decisions.
The new file front matter has type decision, role patch, status draft, and parent decision-00020-checkout-risk-review.
The new file includes Context, Decision, and Consequences sections with concrete content.
The Context names the existing decision being clarified, and the Consequences include at least one downside.
